rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal values. Elec. Code §254.129 governs campaign committee status change notices. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: If a specific-purpose committee changes its operation and becomes a general-purpose committee, the committee's campaign treasurer shall deliver written notice of the change in status to the authority with whom the specific-purpose committee's reports under this chapter are required to be filed.
_note: No relationship between proposed change and rule text; rule addresses election code campaign finance procedures.
